name: Commit Message Alignment
description: Ensures commit messages conform to the conventional commits specification.
instructions: Review the proposed commit message ($KIRO_COMMIT_MSG). It must match the conventional commits format: <type>[optional scope]: <description>. Types allowed: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore, revert. If it fails, reject the commit and provide the corrected format.
